_meta.name: okta-add-user-to-group
_meta.description: Add an Okta user to a group via the group's Assign People page. Uses selector template substitution (fixed in background.ts v2) to target the exact user row. Requires groupId and userId.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-16

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active.

userId.description: Okta user ID (format: 00u{alphanumeric}698). Get from list-users or knownUserIds below.

groupId.description: Okta group ID (format: 00g{alphanumeric}). Get from list-groups or knownGroupIds below.

anomalies: DOM: each row has a.assign-member-button (class: assign-member-button link-button link-button-icon icon-only)
background.ts fix: selector now interpolated via interpolate() in click and type actions
tr:has() CSS selector requires Chrome 105+ — confirmed supported
After assignment, the row shows a Remove link instead of the assign button
The 'Everyone' group cannot have members added manually (auto-populated)

chain.note: Navigate to group Assign People page. All non-member users listed here.
Wait for SPA to render the members table
Confirm page loaded. Should see table with rows of unassigned users.
Click the assign (+) button in the row for the target user. Requires selector interpolation fix in background.ts.
Wait for the assignment to process (AJAX)
Verify assignment succeeded. User row should now show Remove link instead of assign button.
